title: Remove Darkness Effect
description: Removes the Darkness effect from the game.
body:
# Remove-Darkness

A lightweight **Fabric mod** that disables Minecraft's *darkness visual effect* in **singleplayer** worlds.

---

## ⚠️ Usage Notice

This mod is **for singleplayer use only**.
If you want to use it on a **multiplayer server**, download and install the **[Server Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/rde-plugin)** instead.

Using client-side mods on servers without permission can violate their rules.
**Always check server policies before joining.**

---

## ⌨️ Hotkey

- Toggle the mod with the default `G` key.
- To change the key, go to **Options -> Controls -> Key Binds**, search for **"Toggle Darkness Removal"**, and assign any key you want.
- The game shows an action bar message confirming whether the mod is *enabled* or *disabled*.

---

## 🧩 Overview

**Remove-Darkness** removes the “darkness” overlay that appears in low-light conditions (such as during Warden encounters or the Darkness potion effect).  
It does **not** change brightness, mob behavior, or gameplay — only the **visual overlay** is affected.

---

## 🌍 Languages

English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese (Brazil).

---
